Montana · Pretoria
Intimate event space

A space made
for your
moment.

Three suites for gatherings of 20–40 people. Baby showers, kitchen teas, bridal showers, birthdays.

Begin the Inquiry Explore the Suites
3 Suites
20–40 Guests
2 Time slots
No Corkage fee
The Space

Built for the small and significant. White-washed walls, warm wooden elements, and private garden spaces — made ready for your gathering.

Every detail considered, because when people gather to celebrate someone they love, the space should feel like it was made for them.

About the Venue
01
Self-Catering Freedom

Bring your own food and drinks. No corkage fee. Kitchen access on selected packages.

02
Décor Partnership

Oaón Events handles full décor — balloon arches, florals, backdrops, and table settings.

03
Secured Parking

On-site secured parking for all guests. No street parking stress on the day.

04
Intimate by Design

20–40 guests is a feature, not a limitation. Spacious enough to breathe, small enough to feel.

The Suites

Three spaces. One venue.

Add photo

The Myrrh Suite

Indoor

White-washed walls and soft natural light — suited to kitchen teas, bridal showers, and intimate birthday lunches.

Capacity 30–40 guests
Morning 08:00 – 13:00
Afternoon 14:00 – 19:00
Add photo

The Olive Suite

In / Out

A hybrid space flowing from an indoor lounge into an outdoor patio — ideal for baby showers where natural light matters.

Capacity 20–30 guests
Morning 08:00 – 13:00
Afternoon 14:00 – 19:00
Add photo

The Garden Suite

Outdoor

An open garden setting dressed with greenery and dappled shade — beautiful for larger groups celebrating in fresh air.

Capacity 30–40 guests
Morning 08:00 – 13:00
Afternoon 14:00 – 19:00
Packages

Décor done for you.

View All Packages

Essential

Enquire for pricing   Get a quote →

What's included
  • Balloon arch (single colour)
  • 10 bamboo chairs
  • Linen tablecloths
  • Basic floral centrepieces
  • Setup included
Best for
  • Intimate kitchen teas
  • Simple birthday lunches
Most popular

Signature

Enquire for pricing   Get a quote →

What's included
  • Custom balloon arch
  • 20 bamboo chairs
  • Styled backdrop
  • Fresh florals + centrepieces
  • Table linen + runners
  • Setup & breakdown
Best for
  • Baby showers & kitchen teas
  • Bridal showers

Premier

Enquire for pricing   Get a quote →

What's included
  • Full custom décor design
  • 30 bamboo chairs
  • Balloon installation
  • Floral arrangements
  • Themed backdrop wall
  • Catering coordination
  • Setup & breakdown
Best for
  • Bridal showers & milestone birthdays

Grand

Enquire for pricing   Get a quote →

What's included
  • Bespoke concept design
  • Full suite transformation
  • Floral ceiling installation
  • Custom neon / signage
  • Catering + serving staff
  • Photography coordination
  • Full event management
Best for
  • Signature celebrations
  • Full turnkey events

All packages offered through Oaón Events · Custom scopes always available

Explore Packages
Good to Know

The details that matter.

No Corkage Fee

Bring your own wine, champagne, or cocktails. No corkage fees, ever.

Self-Catering

Bring your own caterer, order in, or cook yourself. Kitchen access on selected packages.

Secured Parking

On-site secured parking for all guests. No stress on arrival day.

Two Time Slots

Morning and afternoon sessions — your event always starts fresh.

08:00 – 13:00 14:00 – 19:00

Tell us about your moment.

Fill in what you know and we'll be in touch to talk through the rest. This is the beginning of a conversation, not a booking form.

We aim to respond within 24 hours. Message on WhatsApp.
